name: Peanut Butter Carob Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together and form into one-inch balls.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes or until tops are barely toasted.
3. Melt butter, honey, and carob together with flour.
4. Slowly pour in cream and stir in vanilla.
5. Pour mixture over the balls.
6. Chill for 1 hour. Makes 36 balls.
